pageContext.name: Gollum 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: The conflicted Hobbit, Gollum, is the eighth character to feature in our THE LORD OF THE RINGS™ Classic Coin Collection.   This 1oz silver coin shows him in full color, while frosting and a mirror finish for the background add depth to this coin's design.   Both coins arrive in a display-ready, quality coin case which is placed inside a matching box. A Certificate of Authenticity is provided, showing the coin's unique number in the limited mintage – 3,000! The legal tender status of the coin is confirmed by Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II effigy on the obverse side.   This is a treasured collectible for any fan, a reminder of the extraordinary characters created in THE LORD OF THE RINGS™ trilogy.   Grab this precious collectible today!
